source: SARS Rates of Tax for Individuals - 12 March 2025 (No changes announced)

notes.calculation_method: Annual equivalent method: annualise monthly taxable income, apply brackets, subtract rebates, de-annualise to monthly PAYE
notes.weekly_conversion: For weekly payroll: multiply weekly taxable income by 52, apply annual brackets, subtract rebates, divide result by 52
notes.rounding: Annual tax rounded to nearest rand. Monthly/weekly PAYE rounded to nearest cent.
notes.no_changes_2026: Budget Speech 12 March 2025 confirmed no changes to individual tax brackets, rebates, or thresholds for 2026 tax year
